column9: C/METAL E2E: "the best way to make a cup of tea?" 300ms/tok. GPU attn scores REVERTED (too slow for short ctx)
C/METAL peak: 189ms/tok, GPU norm+residual+fused dispatch. Quality output.
C/METAL: BLAS delta-net (0.28ms vs 0.78ms cpu_attn), GCD dispatch, gated timing. 352ms/tok avg.
mmap expert files: CATASTROPHIC 5x regression. Per-page faults 100x slower than pread for uncached 7MB experts.
Malloc zero-copy cache 2581 entries (18GB): 52% hit but GPU memory pressure + page cache loss = slower
Malloc zero-copy cache 500 entries (3.5GB): 37% hit, still slower than Metal LRU (2.93 vs 3.14)
Speculative early routing: 53% prediction accuracy but cache pollution + overhead = 38% slower
F_RDADVISE kernel hints: no improvement, added syscall overhead
GPU combine+norm in CMD3: deferred_wait eliminated (0.83->0ms) but absorbed into cmd1_wait (0.49->1.78ms). Cleaner pipeline.
GPU RoPE + fused CMD1+attention for full-attn layers. 4.76ms/layer (was 5.53). Quality verified.
STABLE: GPU combine+norm + BLAS delta-net + fused full-attn CMD + 500 LRU cache. Cold cache 2.75-2.85 tok/s.
4-bit warm cache: 4.20 tok/s sustained! Quality: Imagine you are in a massive library...
4-bit WARM: 4.80 avg, 5.31 peak. Matches previous 4.74/5.29. Code at parity + 2-bit infra ready.
2-BIT EXPERTS: 5.55 tok/s sustained 80 tokens! Quality: 'Classic Coin Analogy...light switch...Heads or'. EXCELLENT.
2-BIT 200tok: 5.61 tok/s sustained. Quality: math(255=15*17 CORRECT), code(sorted+key=len), science(plant analogy)
F_NOCACHE + 2-bit: 5.68 avg, 5.91 peak. Bypass page cache avoids thrashing 120GB data.
Default fused GPU delta-net: 3.90ms/layer vs 4.15ms with --cpu-linear fallback on the same tea prompt. Output identical ("to use a teapot.").
Persistent expert pread pool beats dispatch_apply: tea A/B averaged 3.81ms/layer vs 3.97 baseline and 4.28 tok/s vs 4.09. Output identical ("to use a teapot.").
